title: The Italian Renaissance.
content:
How splendid and how vain in thee
    The ancient quest, Italy!
    Too strange that wreath, too strangely worn,
    Apollo's laurel, Christ's red thorn!
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Margaret Steele Anderson delivers a powerful performance in "The Italian Renaissance."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
